en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Avenge the people of Israel on the Midianites. Afterward you shall be gathered to your people."
zh: “你要在米甸人身上報以色列人的仇，然後要歸到你本族那裡去。”

en: So Moses spoke to the people, saying, "Arm men from among you for the war, that they may go against Midian to execute the LORD's vengeance on Midian.
zh: 摩西對人民說：“要從你們中間使一些人武裝起來去作戰，攻擊米甸人，好在米甸人身上為耶和華報仇。

en: You shall send a thousand from each of the tribes of Israel to the war."
zh: 你們要從以色列眾支派中每支派打發一千人去打仗。”

en: So there were provided, out of the thousands of Israel, a thousand from each tribe, twelve thousand armed for war.
zh: 於是從以色列千萬人中，每支派選出一千人，共有一萬二千人，都武裝起來去打仗。

en: And Moses sent them to the war, a thousand from each tribe, together with Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest, with the vessels of the sanctuary and the trumpets for the alarm in his hand.
zh: 摩西就打發每支派的一千人去打仗，並且派遣以利亞撒祭司的兒子非尼哈與他們一同去，非尼哈手裡拿著聖所的器皿和吹大聲的號筒。

en: They warred against Midian, as the LORD commanded Moses, and killed every male.
zh: 他們就照著耶和華吩咐摩西的，去與米甸人作戰，殺死了所有的男人。

en: They killed the kings of Midian with the rest of their slain, Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur, and Reba, the five kings of Midian. And they also killed Balaam the son of Beor with the sword.
zh: 在那些被殺的人以外，還殺了米甸的五個王，就是以未、利金、蘇珥、戶珥和利巴；又用刀殺了比珥的兒子巴蘭。

en: And the people of Israel took captive the women of Midian and their little ones, and they took as plunder all their cattle, their flocks, and all their goods.
zh: 以色列人擄了米甸人的婦女、孩子；又擄掠了他們所有的牲畜、羊群和財物；

en: All their cities in the places where they lived, and all their encampments, they burned with fire,
zh: 並用火燒了他們所住地方的一切城市和營寨；

en: and took all the spoil and all the plunder, both of man and of beast.
zh: 把一切奪來的和擄掠的，連人帶牲畜都帶走；

en: Then they brought the captives and the plunder and the spoil to Moses, and to Eleazar the priest, and to the congregation of the people of Israel, at the camp on the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.
zh: 他們把俘擄的人和擄來的，以及奪來的東西，都帶到摩押平原，約旦河邊，和耶利哥相對的營地那裡，交給摩西和以利亞撒祭司，以及以色列的會眾。

en: Moses and Eleazar the priest and all the chiefs of the congregation went to meet them outside the camp.
zh: 摩西和以利亞撒祭司，以及會眾所有的領袖，都出到營外迎接他們。

en: And Moses was angry with the officers of the army, the commanders of thousands and the commanders of hundreds, who had come from service in the war.
zh: 摩西對作戰回來的軍官，就是對千夫長和百夫長發怒。

en: Moses said to them, "Have you let all the women live?
zh: 摩西對他們說：“你們讓這些婦女存活嗎？

en: Behold, these, on Balaam's advice, caused the people of Israel to act treacherously against the LORD in the incident of Peor, and so the plague came among the congregation of the LORD.
zh: 看哪，這些婦女因巴蘭的計謀，使以色列人在毘珥的事上，得罪耶和華，以致瘟疫臨到耶和華的會眾身上。

en: Now therefore, kill every male among the little ones, and kill every woman who has known man by lying with him.
zh: 現在你們要把所有的男孩都殺了，也要殺死所有與男人發生過關係的婦人。

en: But all the young girls who have not known man by lying with him keep alive for yourselves.
zh: 但女孩子中，沒有與男人發生過關係的，你們都可以讓她們活著。

en: Encamp outside the camp seven days. Whoever of you has killed any person and whoever has touched any slain, purify yourselves and your captives on the third day and on the seventh day.
zh: 你們要在營外駐紮七天，殺過人的和摸過死屍的，第三日和第七日都要潔淨自己，你們和你們擄來的人都要這樣行。

en: You shall purify every garment, every article of skin, all work of goats' hair, and every article of wood."
zh: 你們也要潔淨一切衣服、皮具、山羊毛織的物和木器。”

en: Then Eleazar the priest said to the men in the army who had gone to battle: "This is the statute of the law that the LORD has commanded Moses:
zh: 以利亞撒祭司對打仗回來的兵丁說：“這是耶和華吩咐摩西的律例：

en: only the gold, the silver, the bronze, the iron, the tin, and the lead,
zh: 金、銀、銅、鐵、錫、鉛，

en: everything that can stand the fire, you shall pass through the fire, and it shall be clean. Nevertheless, it shall also be purified with the water for impurity. And whatever cannot stand the fire, you shall pass through the water.
zh: 能夠經火的東西，你們都要使它經火，它就潔淨了，但還要用除污水潔淨它；不能經火的，你們要使它經過水。

en: You must wash your clothes on the seventh day, and you shall be clean. And afterward you may come into the camp."
zh: 第七日，你們要洗衣服，就為潔淨；然後才可以進營。”

en: The LORD said to Moses,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Take the count of the plunder that was taken, both of man and of beast, you and Eleazar the priest and the heads of the fathers' houses of the congregation,
zh: “你和以利亞撒祭司，以及會眾的各族長，要計算俘擄的人和掠得的牲畜的總數。

en: and divide the plunder into two parts between the warriors who went out to battle and all the congregation.
zh: 你要把掠奪得的分為兩半，一半給出去打仗的人，一半給全體會眾。

en: And levy for the LORD a tribute from the men of war who went out to battle, one out of five hundred, of the people and of the oxen and of the donkeys and of the flocks.
zh: 你又要從出去打仗的人所得的，無論是人、牛、驢，或羊群之中，抽出五百分之一作貢物奉給耶和華；

en: Take it from their half and give it to Eleazar the priest as a contribution to the LORD.
zh: 你們要從他們那一半中抽出，交給以利亞撒祭司，作耶和華的舉祭。

en: And from the people of Israel's half you shall take one drawn out of every fifty, of the people, of the oxen, of the donkeys, and of the flocks, of all the cattle, and give them to the Levites who keep guard over the tabernacle of the LORD."
zh: 從以色列人那一半中，無論是人、牛、驢、羊群，或是各樣牲畜，都要抽出五十分之一，交給負責看守耶和華帳幕的利未人。”

en: And Moses and Eleazar the priest did as the LORD commanded Moses.
zh: 於是，摩西和以利亞撒祭司照著耶和華吩咐摩西的行了。

en: Now the plunder remaining of the spoil that the army took was 675,000 sheep,
zh: 掠得的東西，就是打仗的人所擄掠剩下來的，共有羊六十七萬五千隻，

en: 72,000 cattle,
zh: 牛七萬二千頭，

en: 61,000 donkeys,
zh: 驢六萬一千頭，

en: and 32,000 persons in all, women who had not known man by lying with him.
zh: 沒有與男人發生過關係的婦人三萬二千人。

en: And the half, the portion of those who had gone out in the army, numbered 337,500 sheep,
zh: 出去打仗的人的分，就是他們所得的那一半，羊共有三十三萬七千五百隻；

en: and the LORD's tribute of sheep was 675.
zh: 這些羊群中，歸耶和華作貢物的，有六百七十五隻。

en: The cattle were 36,000, of which the LORD's tribute was 72.
zh: 牛三萬六千頭，歸耶和華為貢物的，有七十二隻。

en: The donkeys were 30,500, of which the LORD's tribute was 61.
zh: 驢三萬零五百頭，歸耶和華為貢物的有六十一匹。

en: The persons were 16,000, of which the LORD's tribute was 32 persons.
zh: 人口一萬六千，歸給耶和華作貢物的，有三十二人。

en: And Moses gave the tribute, which was the contribution for the LORD, to Eleazar the priest, as the LORD commanded Moses.
zh: 摩西照著耶和華吩咐他的，把貢物，就是耶和華的舉祭，交給以利亞撒祭司。

en: From the people of Israel's half, which Moses separated from that of the men who had served in the army-
zh: 以色列人所得的那一半，就是摩西從打仗的人取來分給他們的 ；

en: now the congregation's half was 337,500 sheep,
zh: 摩西照著耶和華吩咐他的，從屬於以色列人的那一半，無論是人口或是牲畜，都抽出五十分之一，交給負責看守耶和華帳幕的利未人。

en: 36,000 cattle,
zh: 統領萬軍的軍長、千夫長和百夫長，都來見摩西，

en: and 30,500 donkeys,
zh: 對摩西說：“你僕人手下作戰的士兵，已經計算總數，沒有缺少一人。

en: and 16,000 persons-
zh: 現在我們把耶和華的供物，都送來了，就是我們各人所得的金器、腳鍊子、鐲子、打印戒指、耳環、手釧，好在耶和華面前，為我們自己贖罪。”

en: from the people of Israel's half Moses took one of every 50, both of persons and of beasts, and gave them to the Levites who kept guard over the tabernacle of the LORD, as the LORD commanded Moses.
zh: 摩西和以利亞撒祭司就收了他們的金子，就是各樣金子做成的器皿。

en: Then the officers who were over the thousands of the army, the commanders of thousands and the commanders of hundreds, came near to Moses
zh: 千夫長和百夫長獻給耶和華為舉祭的一切金子，共有兩百多公斤。

en: and said to Moses, "Your servants have counted the men of war who are under our command, and there is not a man missing from us.
zh: 士兵都各自奪取了財物。

en: And we have brought the LORD's offering, what each man found, articles of gold, armlets and bracelets, signet rings, earrings, and beads, to make atonement for ourselves before the LORD."
zh: 摩西和以利亞撒祭司就從千夫長和百夫長手中收了金子，把它帶進會幕裡去，在耶和華面前作以色列人的記念。

en: And Moses and Eleazar the priest received from them the gold, all crafted articles.
And all the gold of the contribution that they presented to the LORD, from the commanders of thousands and the commanders of hundreds, was 16,750 shekels.
(The men in the army had each taken plunder for himself.)
And Moses and Eleazar the priest received the gold from the commanders of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it into the tent of meeting, as a memorial for the people of Israel before the LORD.
